MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment [CCP Sec. 473(B)] is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

Plaintiff Aig Property Casualty Companys Notice And Motion For Default Judgment Against Alliance Plumbing Works, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Aig Property Casualty Companys Notice And Motion For Default Judgment Against Oneill Construction, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Amy Hammond, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, AIG PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY>
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALLIANCE PLUMBING WORKS, INC., and O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $152,586.78
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,759.06
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $799.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $160,145.74
Judgment signed in open court.
